More specifically, it is by the townhall, but the photographer has his back against it. Impressive if it also recognizes the specific statue in front which is of Jean Guitton.

details.description: A cobbled square lined with limestone arcaded buildings featuring continuous wrought‑iron balconies, pilasters, and a slate mansard roof with dormer windows. In the center stands a bronze statue of a historic male figure on a tall stone pedestal with relief plaques. Café terraces with parasols occupy the arcades at ground level. The sky is overcast and a few pedestrians are present.

details.description: A cobbled civic square dominated by a large pale stone city hall building with a symmetrical façade, decorative stonework, and a row of arched arcades on the ground floor. In the foreground a bronze statue atop a stone pedestal stands at the center of the square. Outdoor cafe tables with white canopies line the ground-floor arcade, and a few people and a bicycle are present near the statue. The building features dormer windows on a slate roof and classical detailing, typical of historic French municipal architecture. The sky is overcast, giving a muted light to the scene, suggesting an urban historic center in La Rochelle, France.

details.description: A historic public square in central La Rochelle, France. The scene shows a bronze statue of a man on a tall stone pedestal at the center of a cobblestoned plaza. Behind it is a long limestone façade with ground‑floor arcades housing cafés (tables, umbrellas, chalkboards), a continuous wrought‑iron balcony above, and a mansard roof with dormer windows—typical 19th‑century French urban architecture. Overcast sky, a few pedestrians, and a small vendor tricycle are present.

details.description: A street-level photograph taken in La Rochelle, France, depicting the Place de l'Hôtel de Ville. The central focus is a bronze statue of Jean Guiton, a historical figure in 17th-century attire, standing on a tall stone pedestal. Behind the statue is a large, multi-story building featuring classical French architecture with a limestone facade, a slate mansard roof with dormer windows, and a ground-floor arcade with arched openings. The ground floor houses commercial establishments, evidenced by white umbrellas and red awnings covering outdoor cafe seating. To the left, a storefront bears the sign 'AGENCE DE L'HOTEL DE VILLE'. The foreground features a cobblestone pavement where pedestrians are walking and taking photos. A yellow cargo bike is parked near the statue. The sky is overcast and grey.

details.description: A vertical shot of the Place de l'Hôtel de Ville in La Rochelle, France, under an overcast sky. In the center stands the bronze statue of Jean Guiton, a 17th-century mayor of the city, atop a stone pedestal. Behind the statue is a grand five-story stone building with a mansard roof, dormer windows, and a long balcony on the second floor. The ground floor features a series of stone arches housing cafes and restaurants with white parasols and outdoor seating. The square is paved with grey cobblestones. A few people are visible, including one person taking a photo and another standing near a cargo bike.

details.description: Urban European square with a bronze statue of a robed male figure on a cylindrical stone pedestal at the center. Behind it is a mid–late 19th‑century Haussmannian-style apartment block in pale limestone with a slate mansard roof, dormer windows with triangular pediments, red-brick chimneys, and continuous wrought-iron balconies. The ground floor has large semi-circular arched windows and café terraces with awnings and outdoor seating. Cobblestone and stone-paver surface; overcast daylight.

details.description: An ornate Beaux-Arts style stone building dominates a European city square. The façade features symmetrical windows, decorative stonework, and a slate mansard roof with dormer windows. Ground-level arcades or large rounded-arch openings house café spaces with red-and-white canopies and outdoor seating. In the foreground is a bronze statue with a green patina atop a stone pedestal, appearing to be part of a fountain or monument. The square is cobblestoned and lightly populated with pedestrians and bicycles, under an overcast sky.

details.description: Urban European square with cobblestone paving and café terraces under red-and-white awnings. At the center stands a bronze statue of a robed/historic male figure on a tall pale-stone pedestal. Behind it is a mid-rise limestone building with a mansard roof, dormer windows, red brick chimneys, wrought-iron balconies, and a row of large arched windows at the lower level—features typical of late 19th‑century Haussmannian architecture in France. Several people are gathered near the statue and café tables on an overcast day.

details.description: A historic urban square dominated by a multi-story stone building with ornate decorative elements. The facade features arched ground-floor windows and a row of uniformly spaced upper-floor windows, with intricate stonework and cornices. In the foreground, a weathered bronze statue stands on a stone pedestal, facing the square. To the right, there are red-and-cream striped awnings over outdoor seating, suggesting a café or restaurant along the pedestrian area. The ground is paved with cobblestones and large stone slabs, and several people are seen milling about, contributing to a lively, old-town atmosphere under a cloudy sky.

details.description: The image (which is rotated 90 degrees clockwise) depicts the Place Chateaubriand in the historic Intra-Muros district of Saint-Malo, France. The prominent subject in the foreground is the bronze statue of the writer François-René de Chateaubriand, standing on a stone pedestal. Behind the statue is the grand façade of the Hôtel France et Chateaubriand, characterized by its classical French architecture with limestone walls, a slate mansard roof with dormer windows, and wrought-iron balconies. The ground floor features a series of arched arcades occupied by cafe terraces with white umbrellas and outdoor seating. To the right (bottom in the upright orientation), a storefront sign reads "AGENCE DE L'HOTEL DE VILLE". The square is paved with cobblestones, and the sky is overcast.

details.description: The image, rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise, shows a large, ornate building in a French city, likely the Hôtel de Ville (City Hall). The building features a Mansard roof with dormer windows, decorative stone carvings between floors, and a ground floor with distinctive circular windows (oculi). In front of the building is a bronze statue of a man in historical attire standing on a stone pedestal. The square is paved with cobblestones and contains outdoor cafe seating with white umbrellas. A sign for 'AGENCE DE L'HOTEL DE VILLE' is visible on the ground floor of the building. The sky is overcast, and the lighting is diffused.
